g.text: System model — producers, consumers, and the wire
Many providers, many consumers, no static wiring. They rendezvous on a shared bus, then talk on per-provider channels.
BusTransport — the wire. Worker + BroadcastChannel (default) · InlineBusTransport fallback (CSP / no bundler worker URL).
Contracts: DebugMessage taxonomy binds provider ↔ consumer; BusTransport binds producer ↔ wire. Neither side names a transport.
